prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to the King Charles III England Coast Path, which is only relevant to England, particularly the Isle of Wight. It does not apply to Scotland as it does not address any matters or legislation relevant to the Scottish Government or its jurisdiction.
